Full job description
About Us

At SmartPA, we don’t just provide support – we transform it. Our vision is to deliver a world-class, human-centred, tech-enabled PA and admin service that delivers measurable results, today and into the future.

Trusted by global leaders in industries like tech, automotive, retail and legal, we’re the engine behind smarter, more efficient operations. With a vibrant, client-focused culture and a team driven by creativity, no two days at SmartPA are ever the same!

As we continue to grow rapidly, this is your opportunity to join us on the journey to becoming the most optimised administrative organisation in the world. If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and create meaningful impact, we want to hear from you!

What You'll Do

At SmartPA, we are the engine of our clients' success. This particular role is assigned to one of our ‘dedicated’ clients, meaning you will be representing our brand whilst working very closely with a global tech giant.

We are looking for a Data & Systems Lead who possesses a bias for action and a relentless drive to build something great. You are a resourceful and creative problem-solver who thrives on ambiguity and the challenge of turning complex data into a competitive advantage. You will be the bridge between technical execution and business impact, ensuring that every piece of data - from a single spreadsheet cell to a complex dashboard build - is accurate, ethical, and strategically aligned with both SmartPA’s and the tech giant's mission.

What Your Day Will Look Like

Stakeholder Partnership: Act as a collaborative partner to cross-functional teams. You will present recommendations clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences, including executive leadership, ensuring your insights are acted upon.
Forensic Data Stewardship: Manage content and data entry with a methodical approach. You identify and correct inaccuracies at the source, maintaining a "perfectionist’s eye" for detail to ensure the source of truth is beyond reproach.
Systems Architecture: Design and maintain low-code applications (AppSheet) and automated Google Sheets ecosystems. You ensure data flows through functions and validation rules with zero friction.
Information Design & Visual Storytelling: Build intuitive dashboards and "data imagery" in Looker Studio. You have a meticulous eye for the finer details of data presentation - ensuring titles are punchy, axes are correctly labelled, and legends are clear - so the end-user understands the "story" of the data at a glance.
AI Acceleration: Spend a percentage of your time identifying how Generative AI tools (e.g., Gemini) can transform data roles, research complex problems, and automate administrative heavy lifting.
Culture & Trust: Champion a data-driven culture by feeding user engagement insights back into models, while maintaining a commitment to user trust and granular privacy controls.
About You

You are a strategic problem solver and a skilled communicator. You are intellectually curious, self-aware, and constantly seeking excellence through opportunities to learn and improve. You are responsive and resilient to challenging, ambiguous, and sometimes changing objectives; you thrive in a fast-paced environment and have a relentless drive to build something great.

You possess a "Privacy by Design" mindset, understanding the ethical implications of data usage and the importance of providing users with granular controls over their information. Most importantly, you are a proactive self-starter who can work independently while remaining a highly collaborative partner to engineering and product management teams.

What You'll Need

Your experience is key, but your attitude is what sets you apart.

Essential:

Platform Expertise: Expert-level Google Sheets (advanced functions, pivot tables, data validation) and Looker Studio for creating executive-level dashboards.
Data Visualisation & Precision: A high level of "chart literacy." You take pride in the meticulous details of data presentation, ensuring every chart is legible, accurately labelled, and accessible to non-technical users.
Execution at Pace: A proven ability to prioritise and work on multiple projects simultaneously to meet competing deadlines.
Data Foundational Skills: Proficiency in SQL to extract and manipulate complex datasets from various sources.
Meticulous Detail: Proven experience in content management, data entry, or administrative roles where you were responsible for absolute data integrity.
Strategic Mindset: Strong business acumen and the ability to connect data-driven insights to business impact, effectively translating business needs into data problems.
Desirable:

AI Fluency: Hands-on experience using Generative AI or Large Language Models (LLMs) to research, write code, or accelerate your workflow.
Technical Foundations: Experience with a programming language to support and automate data cleaning or perform statistical modelling.
Low-Code Automation: Experience building custom business apps via AppSheet or using Google Apps Script to interconnect G-Suite products.
Schedule:

Monday - Friday
Your working hours will be 2:00pm to 10:30pm, aligned to cover the 9:00am to 5:30pm (EST) business day.

What's in it for you

At SmartPA we believe in rewarding talent and supporting your growth .

Competitive Salaries
Department based incentives
Remote Work
33 Days Holiday: Because rest fuels greatness
Growth Opportunities: Develop your skills, advance your career and grow with a company reshaping the industry
Employee Assistance Programme
Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Benefits:

Company pension
Enhanced maternity leave
Flexitime
Health & wellbeing programme
Work from home
Work Location: Remote
sector: PA and admin services / data and operations
shortCompanyReason: SmartPA is named in the advert and described as a global PA and admin service provider.
shortRoleReason: The title and duties focus on data, systems, dashboards, and operations leadership.
companySummary: SmartPA provides human-centred, tech-enabled PA and admin services to global clients across sectors including tech, automotive, retail and legal.
roleSummary: A remote strategic data and operations role focused on data stewardship, dashboarding, low-code systems, AI-enabled workflow improvement, and stakeholder partnership.
headlineAttraction: Work remotely on a high-impact data and systems role supporting a global tech giant.
rolePurpose: To turn complex data into accurate, ethical, business-aligned insights and systems that improve operations and support client success.
advertSummary: SmartPA is hiring a Strategic Data & Operations Lead for a remote, full-time permanent role supporting a dedicated global tech client. The role combines expert Google Sheets and Looker Studio work with SQL, data integrity, low-code automation, AI exploration, and clear communication with cross-functional and executive stakeholders.
personalisedIntro: I’m applying because this role sits right at the point where I do my best work: making data reliable, useful and trusted enough for people to act on. My background is in operations, reporting and service improvement in complex environments, so I’m comfortable working with incomplete information, tightening the process, and turning it into something decision-ready.
whyThisRole: This feels like a good fit because the work is practical, technical and operational at the same time. I’d be contributing where data quality, dashboard clarity, workflow design and stakeholder communication all need to line up, which is the kind of environment I’ve worked in before.
coreResponsibilities: Partner with cross-functional teams and present recommendations to diverse audiences
Manage content and data entry with a focus on accuracy and source-of-truth integrity
Design and maintain low-code applications and automated Google Sheets systems
Build dashboards and visual reports in Looker Studio
Explore Generative AI tools to improve research and automate admin work
Champion a data-driven culture and maintain user trust and privacy controls
essentialRequirements: Strong chart literacy and data visualisation precision
Ability to prioritise multiple projects and meet deadlines
Experience in content management, data entry, or administrative roles with strong data integrity
Strong business acumen and ability to translate business needs into data problems
preferredRequirements: Experience using Generative AI or LLMs
Programming language experience for data cleaning or statistical modelling
impliedStrategicGoals: become the most optimised administrative organisation in the world

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: I turn messy operational data into clear decisions, controls and action.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m applying because this role sits right at the point where I do my best work: making data reliable, useful and trusted enough for people to act on. My background is in operations, reporting and service improvement in complex environments, so I’m comfortable working with incomplete information, tightening the process, and turning it into something decision-ready.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: SmartPA stands out to me because the brief is clear about the kind of business it wants to be: human-centred, tech-enabled, and measured on real outcomes. I also like that the role sits inside a fast-growing business working with a global tech client, where the standard is high and the work has to be both accurate and useful.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This feels like a good fit because the work is practical, technical and operational at the same time. I’d be contributing where data quality, dashboard clarity, workflow design and stakeholder communication all need to line up, which is the kind of environment I’ve worked in before.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Built live operational dashboard concept for GP practice visibility
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve already worked on the logic behind live operational visibility, bringing fragmented information into one place so people could see pressure points quickly. That maps well to the need for clear, accurate dashboards that non-technical users can trust.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the strongest reporting example near the top of the page, especially where dashboard thinking is discussed.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve built the logic for live visibility when teams needed a clearer operational picture.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This shows I can improve a live service by tightening follow-through and fixing the issues that affect outcomes at source. The result was a clear improvement in measured performance, which is the same discipline this role needs around accurate, trusted data.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a proof point for operational control, accuracy and measurable improvement.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve turned around a live service by improving control, consistency and follow-through.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: prioritisation, stakeholder coordination and working with sensitive data
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve worked in a regulated, data-sensitive environment where deadlines, service standards and team coordination all had to hold together. That gives me a good base for handling multiple priorities while keeping standards high and communication clear.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as supporting evidence for pace, stakeholder handling and trust.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’m used to balancing deadlines, service standards and sensitive data without losing control.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: My read is that this role needs someone who can keep data clean, make reporting genuinely useful, and improve the systems behind the work rather than just the output. It also needs someone who can move between detail and stakeholder conversation without losing accuracy, pace or trust.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Expert Google Sheets and structured reporting
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve built reporting logic and operational visibility from fragmented information, and I’m used to working in ways that help teams understand what is happening quickly.
experienceMappings.relevance: This supports the need for strong spreadsheet-based reporting and clear decision support.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Looker Studio-style dashboard clarity and chart precision
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked on live operational views where the point was to make pressure, status and service strain easy to understand at a glance.
experienceMappings.relevance: This aligns with the need for clean, legible dashboards that non-technical users can read confidently.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: In NHS primary care I improved control around patient-facing issues and service follow-through, where accuracy and consistency mattered to the outcome.
experienceMappings.relevance: This shows I’m comfortable tightening process where the quality of the underlying data or action matters.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Prioritising multiple projects and meeting deadlines
experienceMappings.myEvidence: At Experian I supported complex annual projects while maintaining service standards and workload control in a sensitive environment.
experienceMappings.relevance: This is relevant to a role that needs pace, organisation and steady delivery across competing demands.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked with live service issues where the practical answer had to be clear, credible and tied to measurable improvement.
experienceMappings.relevance: This fits the need to present recommendations that different audiences will actually use.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: In manufacturing I helped strengthen delivery discipline and resilience during a scale-up phase.
experienceMappings.relevance: This supports the idea that I can improve systems and ways of working, not just report on them.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Working with sensitive or regulated data
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in a high-security, data-sensitive corporate setting where standards and control mattered.
experienceMappings.relevance: This is important for a role that places weight on privacy, trust and careful handling of information.

focusAreasToBring.title: Data stewardship
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d focus on making the source of truth dependable, with clear checks, clean inputs and reporting people can trust.

focusAreasToBring.title: Dashboard usefulness
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d keep the reporting practical: clear labels, sensible structure and outputs that help people act quickly.

focusAreasToBring.title: Workflow improvement
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d look for repetitive manual work and weak handoffs, then simplify them where possible without losing control.

focusAreasToBring.title: Stakeholder translation
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d make sure technical detail is turned into language that executive and operational teams can use.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring a mix of operational control, reporting discipline and improvement work across healthcare, manufacturing, leisure and regulated data services. That means I’m comfortable with complexity, used to working across functions, and focused on making information accurate enough to support real decisions.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I’d expect to spend the first months getting close to the data, understanding the current reporting and control points, and identifying where accuracy or manual effort is getting in the way. From there I’d look to improve dashboard quality, tighten data handling, and spot practical automation opportunities that save time without weakening trust.
companyHighlights: SmartPA describes itself as human-centred and tech-enabled.
The role supports a dedicated global tech client.
The advert signals a fast-growing, remote working environment with a strong focus on measurable results and privacy controls.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work well in environments where the brief is moving, the standards are high and the answer is usually in the detail. I’m comfortable being self-directed, but I also like working closely with other teams when the work depends on trust and clarity.

first90DaysPlan.focus: Understand the data and control points
first90DaysPlan.detail: I’d get close to the current reporting, data entry and workflow setup, understand where the source of truth sits, and learn what different stakeholders actually need from the outputs.
I’d focus on improving the clarity and reliability of the core dashboards and reports, while identifying any recurring data issues or manual steps that can be reduced.
I’d start testing where low-code tools, better spreadsheet design or AI-assisted research could remove friction, while keeping privacy and data quality intact.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I’d bring a steady, practical approach to making SmartPA’s data and systems more reliable, more useful and easier to trust.
closingProofPoints: I improved a live NHS service’s Google review score from 2.09 to 4.51.
I built reporting around workflow, room use, payroll and contractual income, including reconciliation of 64 PCSE remittance files.
I’ve worked in regulated and data-sensitive environments where accuracy and control mattered.
contentNotes: I have not claimed direct Looker Studio, SQL, AppSheet, Google Apps Script or Generative AI experience because it is not shown in the CV or evidence bank.
I used the strongest available reporting and dashboard-related evidence from healthcare and regulated data environments to support the technical brief.
The advert is strong on tools, but the CV evidence is stronger on operations, reporting discipline and data-sensitive delivery than on named platform expertise.

examples.title: “Built live operational dashboard concept for GP practice visibility”
